title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
